Part.Source:
//precisa fazer isso para poder calcular a base piscofins For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
&NfsTotSer = 0 &NfsTipNF = NfsTipNF
For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod, NfsItmCod &NfsTotSer += NfsItmValTot
&NfsItmCodUltimo = NfsItmCod EndFor
&NfsTotDesc = NfsTotDesc &taxacalculo = 0 if &NfsTotSer > 0 and NfsTotDesc > 0 &taxacalculo = (NfsTotDesc / &NfsTotSer) //350/8200 = 0,04268293 Endif
&ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda = 0 Do CAse CAse NfsRetPisCofins = TipoRetencaoPisCofins.PisCofinsRetido &ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda = NfsTotPIS+NfsTotCofins CAse NfsRetPisCofins = TipoRetencaoPisCofins.PisCofinsNaoRetido
CAse NfsRetPisCofins = TipoRetencaoPisCofins.PisRetidoCofinsNaoRetido &ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda = NfsTotPIS CAse NfsRetPisCofins = TipoRetencaoPisCofins.PisNaoRetidoCofinsRetido &ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda = NfsTotCofins EndCase
Do CAse CAse NfsRetISSNov = TipoRetencaoIssqn.RetidoIntermediario &ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda += NfsTotISS CAse NfsRetISSNov = TipoRetencaoIssqn.RetidoTomador &ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda += NfsTotISS EndCase
&ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda += (NfsTotIR + NfsTotCPP + NfsTotCSLL) NfsTotBasPIS = &NfsTotSer - NfsTotDesc NfsTotBasCofins = &NfsTotSer - NfsTotDesc
NfsTotSer = &NfsTotSer NfsVlrTot = &NfsTotSer - (NfsTotDesc+&ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda) EndFor
Commit
For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod, NfsItmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod Where NfsItmCod = 1 when &NfsTipNF = 'S' //Nacional so usa o item 1.
if &taxacalculo > 0 if &NfsItmCodUltimo <> NfsItmCod NfsItmDesc = round(NfsItmValTot * &taxacalculo, 2) &NfsTotDesc -= NfsItmDesc Else NfsItmDesc = &NfsTotDesc Endif Else NfsItmDesc = 0 Endif
EndFor
Commit
For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
if NfsPerISS > 0 and NfsTotBasPIS > 0 NfsTotISS = round(NfsTotBasPIS * (NfsPerISS/100),2) Else NfsTotISS = 0 Endif
if NfsPerCofins > 0 and NfsTotBasPIS > 0 NfsTotCofins = round(NfsTotBasPIS * (NfsPerCofins/100),2) Else NfsTotCofins = 0 Endif
if NfsPerIR > 0 and NfsTotBasPIS > 0 NfsTotIR = round(NfsTotBasPIS * (NfsPerIR/100),2) Else NfsTotIR = 0 Endif
if NfsPerCPP > 0 and NfsTotBasPIS > 0 NfsTotCPP = round(NfsTotBasPIS * (NfsPerCPP/100),2) Else NfsTotCPP = 0 Endif
if NfsPerPIS > 0 and NfsTotBasPIS > 0 NfsTotPIS = round(NfsTotBasPIS * (NfsPerPIS/100),2) Else NfsTotPIS = 0 Endif
if NfsPerINSS > 0 and NfsTotBasPIS > 0 NfsTotINSS = round(NfsTotBasPIS * (NfsPerINSS/100),2) Else NfsTotINSS = 0 Endif
if NfsPerCSLL > 0 and NfsTotBasPIS > 0 NfsTotCSLL = round(NfsTotBasPIS * (NfsPerCSLL/100),2) Else NfsTotCSLL = 0 Endif
if NfsPerOut > 0 and NfsTotBasPIS > 0 NfsTotOut = round(NfsTotBasPIS * (NfsPerOut/100),2) Else NfsTotOut = 0 Endif
Exit EndFor
Commit
//preicsa fazer isso para recalcular o total da nfse com os descontos dos retidos For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
&NfsTotSer = 0
For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod, NfsItmCod Where NfsItmCod = 1 when &NfsTipNF = 'S' //Nacional so usa o item 1.
&NfsTotSer += NfsItmValTot
&NfsItmCodUltimo = NfsItmCod EndFor
&NfsTotDesc = NfsTotDesc &taxacalculo = 0 if &NfsTotSer > 0 and NfsTotDesc > 0 &taxacalculo = (NfsTotDesc / &NfsTotSer) //350/8200 = 0,04268293 Endif
&ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda = 0 Do CAse CAse NfsRetPisCofins = TipoRetencaoPisCofins.PisCofinsRetido &ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda = NfsTotPIS+NfsTotCofins CAse NfsRetPisCofins = TipoRetencaoPisCofins.PisCofinsNaoRetido
CAse NfsRetPisCofins = TipoRetencaoPisCofins.PisRetidoCofinsNaoRetido &ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda = NfsTotPIS CAse NfsRetPisCofins = TipoRetencaoPisCofins.PisNaoRetidoCofinsRetido &ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda = NfsTotCofins EndCase
Do CAse CAse NfsRetISSNov = TipoRetencaoIssqn.RetidoIntermediario &ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda += NfsTotISS CAse NfsRetISSNov = TipoRetencaoIssqn.RetidoTomador &ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda += NfsTotISS EndCase
&ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda += (NfsTotIR + NfsTotCPP + NfsTotCSLL) NfsTotBasPIS = &NfsTotSer - NfsTotDesc NfsTotBasCofins = &NfsTotSer - NfsTotDesc
NfsTotSer = &NfsTotSer NfsVlrTot = &NfsTotSer - (NfsTotDesc+&ValorTotalPisCofinsRetidosMoeda) EndFor
Commit
